<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of the league/commonmark package. * * (c) Colin O'Dell <colinodell@gmail.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace League\CommonMark\Input; interface MarkdownInputInterface { public function getContent(): string; /** * @return iterable<int, string> */ public function getLines(): iterable; public function getLineCount(): int; }
